name: national_identity_pride
description: Measures the strength of emotional attachment and pride in being Mexican, including feelings toward the country and sense of belonging to one's locality. Captures affective identification with national and local community.

name: tolerance_social_diversity
description: Measures openness and acceptance toward socially diverse groups, including ethnic minorities, people of different religions, and homosexuals, as well as opinions on how cultural differences should be managed in society.

name: interpersonal_institutional_trust
description: Measures the degree to which respondents trust others in their social environment — neighbors, police, and people in general — reflecting generalized social trust and confidence in formal institutions.

name: personal_optimism_efficacy
description: Measures respondents' sense of control over their own lives, confidence in achieving future goals, satisfaction with life, and perceived ability to determine their own future, capturing a latent dimension of personal agency and optimism.

name: moral_normative_conservatism
description: Measures adherence to traditional or conservative moral norms across family, sexuality, and social conduct, including views on premarital sex, abortion, corporal punishment of children, and self-identification on a conservative-liberal spectrum.
